title: Petty Cash
subtitle: Multi-box imprest register · cash on hand + receipts held should total the imprest
empty_description: Add a box to track small-denomination cash disbursements against a fixed imprest. OWNER only — ACCOUNTANT records transactions once a box exists.
error_load_boxes: Failed to load petty cash boxes.
no_transactions: No transactions recorded yet for this box.

box_modal.imprest_hint: The target balance the box is topped up to on every replenishment. Typically KD 50-500 for an office box.
box_modal.error_imprest_format: Imprest amount must be a non-negative decimal with up to 3 decimal places.
box_modal.error_imprest_positive: Imprest amount must be greater than zero.
box_modal.error_generic: Failed to create box. Please try again.

tx_modal.type_hint_EXPENSE: Decreases cash on hand. Attach the receipt reference where possible.
tx_modal.type_hint_REPLENISH: Increases cash on hand — OWNER tops the box back to imprest.
tx_modal.type_hint_ADJUSTMENT: Use for cash-count corrections or variances found during reconciliation.
tx_modal.description_placeholder: e.g. Office tea + biscuits — staff break
tx_modal.error_amount_format: Amount must be a non-negative decimal with up to 3 decimal places.
tx_modal.error_amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero.
tx_modal.error_generic: Failed to record transaction. Please try again.
